vulns.title: Drupal Core SQL Injection Vulnerability
vulns.summary: Drupal Core PostgreSQL SQL Injection PoC -. Ethical PoC for the Drupal vulnerability allowing anonymous SQL injection through the JSON:API module on PostgreSQL-backed sites.
vulns.technicalSummary: CVE-2026-9082 is a highly critical SQL injection vulnerability affecting Drupal core sites configured to use PostgreSQL as the backend database. The vulnerability exists in Drupal’s database abstraction API, where specially crafted requests can bypass.
vulns.breakdown: CVE-2026-9082 is a highly critical SQL injection vulnerability affecting Drupal core sites configured to use PostgreSQL as the backend database. The vulnerability exists in Drupal’s database abstraction API, where specially crafted requests can bypass.
vulns.whatBroke: Drupal Core PostgreSQL SQL Injection PoC -. Ethical PoC for the Drupal vulnerability allowing anonymous SQL injection through the JSON:API module on PostgreSQL-backed sites.
vulns.reality: Realistic when the affected product is exposed and unpatched. The updater only includes this because public tooling signal was found at 7h30th3r0n3/CVE-2026-9082-Drupal-PoC.
vulns.exploitSyntax:
# authorized lab / owned targets only
git clone https://github.com/7h30th3r0n3/CVE-2026-9082-Drupal-PoC
cd CVE-2026-9082-Drupal-PoC
python3 <script>.py --target https://<authorized-target>
# confirm exact flags in the linked GitHub README before validation
chains: initial access through exposed Core
credential access from service context
webshell or command execution follow-up
internal pivot from an internet-facing control point
lateral movement if secrets or management access are recovered
vulns.weaponized: Likely worth tracking because public tooling exists and recent source activity was observed.

vulns.title: Linux Kernel Incorrect Resource Transfer Between Spheres Vulnerability
vulns.summary: Multi-architecture Linux privilege escalation toolkit with 18 pre-built and runtime-compilable exploits. Auto-detects kernel version, filters patched exploits, tries each until root.
vulns.technicalSummary: Multi-architecture Linux privilege escalation toolkit with 18 pre-built and runtime-compilable exploits. Auto-detects kernel version, filters patched exploits, tries each until root.
vulns.breakdown: Multi-architecture Linux privilege escalation toolkit with 18 pre-built and runtime-compilable exploits. Auto-detects kernel version, filters patched exploits, tries each until root.
vulns.whatBroke: Multi-architecture Linux privilege escalation toolkit with 18 pre-built and runtime-compilable exploits. Auto-detects kernel version, filters patched exploits, tries each until root.
vulns.reality: Realistic when the affected product is exposed and unpatched. The updater only includes this because public tooling signal was found at portbuster1337/lpe-toolkit.
vulns.exploitSyntax:

git clone https://github.com/portbuster1337/lpe-toolkit
cd lpe-toolkit
make
./<compiled-poc> <authorized-target>
# confirm exact flags in the linked GitHub README before validation
chains: initial access through exposed Kernel
local privilege escalation after a foothold
lateral movement if secrets or management access are recovered

vulns.title: Langflow Code Injection Vulnerability
